form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (20.37) in a Mix 5, finishing a 4.5 lengths fourth. Goes very well from the draw boasting three places from five starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.28) at this track in a Mix 5, finishing sixth and beaten 5 lengths. Box stats strong with four wins and three placings from 10 starts. Has ability and should be around the money.

form.formComment: Solid performance after racing just off the speed to win by 1.5 lengths at this track over 366m (20.08) beating Nana Marie in Mix 5 on April 12. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.
